summary: Result Cards (Phase 3 Viral Loop) - All backend tests pass (14/14). Frontend public pages render correctly for all 3 card types. Error state works for nonexistent cards. Mobile-first design verified.

issues: Share/Copy buttons (CTAs) are NOT rendered on the public page - they only appear in the authenticated ResultCardSection view. If the requirement is to have Share/Copy on the public page, ResultCardPublicPage.js needs to include <ResultCardActions card={card} /> component.

backend_pytest: ✅ GET /api/result-cards/{card_id} - view_count increments on each request
✅ POST /api/result-cards - idempotent (same card returned for same user+appointment+type)
✅ GET /api/result-cards/my-cards - returns list of user's cards
✅ Card data structure verified for all 3 types
frontend_playwright: ✅ /card/:cardId renders compensation_received card with amount (35 EUR)
✅ /card/:cardId renders charity_donation card with association (Restos du Coeur)
✅ /card/nonexistent shows error state with 'Retour à l'accueil' button
✅ Discover NLYT CTA present on all public card pages
✅ 3 card variants display different headlines, icons, and brand lines

action_items: OPTIONAL: If Share/Copy buttons are required on the public page, add <ResultCardActions card={card} /> to ResultCardPublicPage.js after the <ResultCard card={card} /> component
critical_code_review_comments: Backend idempotence correctly implemented - same card returned for same user+appointment+type
View count increments correctly on each GET request
All 3 card types have distinct visual styling (green/blue/amber accent colors)
Public endpoint correctly requires no authentication
data-testid attributes present on all key elements for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test cards created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Result Cards feature complete. 3 card types (engagement_respected, compensation_received, charity_donation) all working. Public page at /card/:cardId renders cards without auth. View count increments. Error state for nonexistent cards. Share/Copy buttons are in ResultCardActions component which is only rendered in authenticated ResultCardSection view, not on public page.

verification_summary.engagement_card: VERIFIED - Green accent, checkmark icon, 'Engagement tenu.' headline, 'Le temps ne se perd plus.' brand line
verification_summary.compensation_card: VERIFIED - Blue accent, diamond icon, 'Temps valorisé.' headline, '35 EUR reçus en compensation.', 'Votre temps a de la valeur.' brand line
verification_summary.charity_card: VERIFIED - Amber accent, heart icon, 'Geste solidaire.' headline, '10 EUR reversés à Restos du Coeur.', 'Chaque absence peut faire du bien.' brand line
verification_summary.error_state: VERIFIED - 'Cette carte n'existe pas ou a été supprimée.' with 'Retour à l'accueil' button
verification_summary.discover_cta: VERIFIED - 'Découvrir NLYT' button with arrow icon on all public pages
verification_summary.mobile_first: VERIFIED - Card renders correctly on 390x844 mobile viewport
